name: youish
abstract: Voice-faithful rewriting for AI agents, designed to preserve a writer's claims, stance, rhythm, uncertainty, useful weirdness, and exact constraints while removing clutter and generic AI polish. Includes compact runtime instructions, optional quality-gate references, and deterministic regression checks for facts, quotes, identity markers, output shape, source-only thought dumps, and live-eval integrity.

skillsSh.summary: Voice-faithful rewriting and editing for messy drafts, notes, emails, posts, captions, docs, and reusable voice profiles.
summaryBullets: Preserves the user's claims, stance, uncertainty, rhythm, humor, useful weirdness, and exact constraints.
Turns rough notes, rants, fragments, and corporate fog into usable prose without inventing facts or flattening voice.

Includes deterministic regression checks for fact drift, invented details, unsupported entities, cultural voice flattening, option diversity, wrappers, word counts, output shape, and live scorecard integrity.
Uses progressive disclosure: compact runtime guidance, optional quality gates, and scripts loaded only for validation or profile work.
